name: Élodie
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: A first-floor two-bedroom residence of over 144 square metres gross with a private patio.
description: A first-floor two-bedroom residence of over 144 square metres gross with a private patio — family scale in the stone-built village quarter of Green Coast, Palasë. Two proper bedrooms, a broad living room and the resort's plaza, pools and Blue Flag beach at the door.
highlights: The heart of the village, off the pedestrian spine
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_body: Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
position_copy: Élodie sits at the heart of the village, on the lanes just west of the pedestrian spine. The parking entrance is directly below, the central plaza and the hotel a short walk east, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
